holdings.name: Tata Consultancy Services
holdings.description: Internet-age IT bellwether transforming enterprises through cloud, AI and digital platforms. Contextual Master ecosystem and AI.Cloud services driving next-gen IT outsourcing at Fortune 500 scale.

holdings.name: Infosys
holdings.description: Digital-first IT partnership. Infosys Springboard (5M+ learners), Cobalt cloud platform and GenAI Topaz are redefining how global enterprises digitalise their operations.

holdings.name: HCL Technologies
holdings.description: India's most product-oriented IT firm. HCL Software business — perpetual + SaaS revenue from 20M+ enterprise users — delivering stable, high-margin internet-era software revenue.

holdings.name: Persistent Systems
holdings.description: High-growth mid-cap IT firm specialising in AI engineering, cloud-native development and BFSI digital transformation. Named a Leader in Salesforce/AWS services. 30%+ revenue growth CAGR outpacing all large-cap peers.

holdings.name: Coforge
holdings.description: Travel tech (Amadeus, Sabre GDS modernisation), BFSI and insurance vertical specialist. Over 60% offshore delivery. BPS and API integration expertise driving large EMEA deal wins.

holdings.name: Wipro
holdings.description: Major digital services player recovering growth momentum. FullStride Cloud (engineering + migration) and Bangalore-HQ enterprise AI lab driving technology modernisation for global banks, retailers and manufacturers.
